description_long: This object is a brown bear-shaped balloon with a rounded body and two prominent, rounded ears on top. The front features two large, black circular patches representing eyes and a smaller black patch for the nose and mouth area, giving it a cartoonish bear face. The balloon has a smooth, slightly glossy surface, and a small white patch is visible on the top of its head. At the bottom center, a black and white attachment point is present, from which a string or tether extends downward. The back of the balloon is plain brown with no facial features, and the overall shape is spherical with slight protrusions for the ears and facial features. This balloon would be suitable for urban events, parks, or street fairs, adding a playful and decorative element to the environment.
description: A brown, bear-shaped balloon with cartoonish facial features, rounded ears, and a small string attached at the bottom. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with a white patch on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear face with large black eyes, nose, and mouth patch, as well as both rounded ears and the bottom string attachment.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlighting the right ear, the protruding facial features, and the white patch on top, with the string visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back of the balloon, both ears, and the white patch on top, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the left ear, the smooth brown surface, the white patch on top, and the string attachment at the bottom.
